description: Determines how a magical tradition has impacted history. Part of the Magical Tradition Focus system.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines how a magical tradition has impacted history. Part of the Magical Tradition Focus system.

entries.result: The tradition was involved in a major historical event, such as helping to win a war or save/destroy a nation

resultTranslations.en: The tradition was involved in a major historical event, such as helping to win a war or save/destroy a nation

entries.result: The tradition has a long history of involvement with powerful people and institutions

resultTranslations.en: The tradition has a long history of involvement with powerful people and institutions

entries.result: A hero from the tradition did something amazing in the past that is still remembered

resultTranslations.en: A hero from the tradition did something amazing in the past that is still remembered

entries.result: A villain from the tradition did something awful in the past that is still remembered

resultTranslations.en: A villain from the tradition did something awful in the past that is still remembered

entries.result: The tradition was involved in a major event in the past that almost no one knows about, like secretly repairing a catastrophic rift in time

resultTranslations.en: The tradition was involved in a major event in the past that almost no one knows about, like secretly repairing a catastrophic rift in time

entries.result: The tradition has been a guardian of something important, whether publicly known or secretly. This can be an object, like securing the Tree of Life, or a duty, like safeguarding the world from extradimensional threats

resultTranslations.en: The tradition has been a guardian of something important, whether publicly known or secretly. This can be an object, like securing the Tree of Life, or a duty, like safeguarding the world from extradimensional threats

entries.result: The tradition has a bad reputation for something. This reputation may be true or false, but people believe it

resultTranslations.en: The tradition has a bad reputation for something. This reputation may be true or false, but people believe it

entries.result: The tradition has a good reputation for something. This reputation may be true or false, but people believe it

resultTranslations.en: The tradition has a good reputation for something. This reputation may be true or false, but people believe it

entries.result: The tradition has made no notable mark on history

resultTranslations.en: The tradition has made no notable mark on history

entries.description: Don't roll on the Meaning Table or make an interpretation

descriptionTranslations.en: Don't roll on the Meaning Table or make an interpretation

entries.description: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning Tables and include them with the other words rolled to make your interpretation

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning Tables and include them with the other words rolled to make your interpretation
